caption: A screen recording displays a browser window showing a complex visual network map against a dark background. The map consists of various circular icons, some containing images and others with text, connected by blue lines. Legible text within these circles includes labels like "Learning," "Identity," "Insights," and "Possible Future." A small pop-up window featuring a cartoon image of a magnet and a small character is positioned in the center of the map. In the top right corner of the browser window, a small video feed shows a person with a headset and a dark cap. The browser tabs at the top include titles such as "Trust & Learning by Systemic," "Future of Society by Systemic," and "Insights > Introduction." Throughout the sequence, the visual layout remains static, with no movement in the network map or the person in the video feed.
